title: Initial implementation of elaboration system tasks

features.name: elaboration system task in generate if block
features.description: Code should include an elaboration system task ($info or $warning) inside a generate if block that checks a parameter value at elaboration time

features.name: elaboration error task halting synthesis
features.description: Code should include an $error or $fatal elaboration system task inside a generate block that stops synthesis for illegal parameter combinations

features.name: elaboration system task in generate for loop
features.description: Code should include an elaboration system task inside a generate for loop to validate conditions during elaboration iteration
features.snippet:
genvar i;
generate
  for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin
    if (i == 3) begin
      $info("Reached last iteration");
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: elaboration system task in generate case block
features.description: Code should include an elaboration system task inside a generate case block to report warnings or errors for specific parameter values
features.snippet:
parameter OP = "ADD";
generate
  case (OP)
    "ADD": begin end
    "SUB": begin end
    default: begin
      $warning("Unknown operation");
    end
  endcase
endgenerate
